name: Instant Remesh
description: Retopologizes any 3D mesh into clean quad or triangle topology using Instant Meshes.

params_schema.label: Target face count
params_schema.tooltip: Target face count. -1 = auto (preserves original density).

params_schema.label: Output topology
params_schema.tooltip: Quads for animation/subdivision. Triangles for game-ready meshes.

params_schema.label: Crease angle (°)
params_schema.tooltip: Preserves sharp edges above this angle. 0 = fully smooth, 25 = recommended.

params_schema.label: Smoothing passes
params_schema.tooltip: Instant Meshes internal smoothing passes. Higher = cleaner edge flow, slower.
